title: matelea altatensis
intro: Matelea altatensis, also known as the "Sailor's Choice" or "Love Vine," is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to Central and South America and has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The leaves and stems of Matelea altatensis have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antipyretic, analgesic, and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Matelea altatensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
